# AI for Biz Calculator

> Free AI automation ROI calculator for small and mid-sized service businesses. Built by Epiphany Dynamics. Answer a short set of questions about your operations and get personalized automation recommendations plus ROI estimates you can actually edit.

## Ownership

- Owned by: Epiphany Dynamics (Wikidata: Q139569923, https://epiphanydynamics.ai)
- Creator: Patrick Gibbs (Wikidata: Q139572015)

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://ai4bizcalculator.online/): Product overview and entry to the calculator
- [Calculator](https://ai4bizcalculator.online/calculator/): Interactive AI automation ROI calculator
- [Blog](https://ai4bizcalculator.online/blog/): 6 articles on AI ROI, automation payback, and process selection
- [About](https://ai4bizcalculator.online/about/): Who built the calculator and why
- [Privacy](https://ai4bizcalculator.online/privacy/): Privacy policy

## How to use the calculator

1. Answer questions about industry, team size, appointment volume, and current tools.
2. Review the estimated hours recovered, cost range, and payback window.
3. Edit the inputs. A trustworthy ROI tool never locks you into a single inflated number.
4. Use the result as a planning range before buying any AI product or agency engagement.

## Blog (6)

- [AI Receptionist ROI: The Value of Fewer Missed Calls](https://ai4bizcalculator.online/blog/ai-receptionist-roi/): Calculate AI receptionist ROI from recovered revenue: missed calls times recovery rate, booking rate, and job value, kept separate from labor savings.
- [AI ROI calculator: how to read the output and spot a fake](https://ai4bizcalculator.online/blog/ai-roi-calculator/): Learn how an AI ROI calculator works, which inputs move the result most, and how to tell a trustworthy tool from an inflated one before you buy.
- [AI Process Automation: Which Process to Automate First](https://ai4bizcalculator.online/blog/ai-process-automation/): Score business processes by frequency, predictability, labor value, and failure tolerance to pick your first AI process automation before spending anything.
- [AI workflow automation ROI: how to calculate the payback](https://ai4bizcalculator.online/blog/ai-workflow-automation-roi/): A plain-English guide to calculating the ROI of AI workflow automation, with the formula, a worked example, and a stress test for optimistic assumptions.
- [How to Automate Business Processes: Score Candidates Before ROI](https://ai4bizcalculator.online/blog/how-to-automate-business-processes/): A numbers-first method to automate business processes: score each candidate on frequency, labor value, failure cost, and difficulty before you run any ROI mode...
- [How to use an AI automation ROI calculator (with a worked example)](https://ai4bizcalculator.online/blog/ai-automation-roi-calculator/): Learn what an AI automation ROI calculator estimates, how to check the result against a real implementation quote, and how to calculate savings, payback, and f...

## Audience

Owners and operators of appointment-based and service businesses who want a concrete ROI range before spending on AI automation, receptionists, chatbots, or workflow tools.
